channel.title: jiujitsu on Almost Headless Blog
channel.description: Recent content in jiujitsu on Almost Headless Blog

item.title: Mechanics of a juji-gatame
item.description: We will use simple physics to gain insight into what it takes to complete an armbar : levers, fulcrums, angles, … Multiple positions How levers work The need of a fulcrum Lever arm Coupled forces
